heading: Ready to make your move?
subheading: Tell us what you're looking for and we'll connect you with the right agent.
success_sub: We'll reach out within 24 hours to discuss your goals.
ph_buyer_msg: What are you looking for? (location, budget, type…)
ph_seller_msg: Tell us about your property (location, type, asking price…)
privacy: We'll only use this to reach out about your inquiry. No spam.
